title: Perfectly Optimized (P.O)
description: This is Perfectly Optimized P.O is an optimization pack I made myself with the smaller bit of experience I have with optimizing packs.
body:
# Perfectly Optimized Welcome to Perfectly Optimized, where I've made the most common versions of Minecraft run as good as possible. I've tested these with my friends who all run low-end PCs/Laptops, so hopefully these can help you out! P.O is meant for anyone who want's a simple optimization pack, with a few of the small qualities of life. This will include all the optimizations, many different shaders to try, and basic mods for assisting in multiplayer & managing all your mod settings. ## HEADS UP! Absolutely **_NONE_** of the mods/shaders added in this modpack are mine, and are all listed and credited below this message. I have just put together all these into a modpack that runs well. ## Specs I run on a laptop that's considered **Low-End**, so all pictures, and footage in the gallery, will be taken at __1280x720p, 12 Chunks Render Distance, with 4GB of RAM allocated to Minecraft, and VSync OFF.__ I have the following hardware (That I know of) - AMD Ryzen 5 8640HS (runs at 3.50 GHz) - 8GB of DDR5 (7.29GB usable) - Radeon 760M Graphics (Intergrated Graphics) - 512MB of Dedicated VRAM w/ 3.6GB of Shared VRAM ## Mods - Fabric API (by modmuss50) - Sodium (by jellysquid3) - Cloth Config API (by shedaniel) - Iris Shaders (by coderbot) - Entity Culling (by tr7zw) - FerriteCore (by malte0811) - Mod Menu (by Prospecter) - Lithium (by jellysquid3) - ImmediatelyFast (by RaphiMC) - ModernFix (by embeddedt) - Reese's Sodium Options (by FlashyReese) - More Culling (by FX) - Krypton (by astei) - Essential Mod (by SparkUniverse) - Debugify (by isxander) - Clumps (by jaredllll08) - Enhanced Block Entities (by FoundationGames) - Noisium (by Steveplays) - BadOptimizations (by thosea) - Fast IP Ping (by fallen-breath) - spark (by lucko) - Very Many Players (by ishland) - Ksyxis (by VidTu) - Particle Core (by fzzyhmstrs) - Text Placeholder API (by Patbox) - Fabric Language Kotlin (by modmuss50) - YetAnotherConfigLib (by isxander) ## Shaders - Complementary Shaders - Reimagined (by EminGT) - BSL Shaders (by CaptTatsu) - Photon Shaders (by sixthsurge) - Rethinking Voxels (by gri573) - Solas Shader (by Septonious) - MakeUp - Ultra Fast (by KDXavier) - Bliss Shaders (by X0nk) - Super Duper Vanilla (by Eldeston) - Miniature Shader (by ukrech) - Mellow (by TheCMK) - Kappa Shader (by RRe36) - Noble Shaders (by BelmuTM) __p.s, all shaders are optimized as best as I can for best performance while maintaining that visual fidelity__ | Version | 1.21.10 | 1.21.1 | 1.19.4 | 1.18.2 | |------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------|--------| | Mods Included | Fabric API ✅
